message:
fix(capacity): implement fail-closed capacity enforcement with terminal-state eviction

Coordinated reliability hardening across capacity-bounded subsystems:

Saga orchestrator (saga.rs):
- Convert create_saga() from void to Result<String, String>
- Evict oldest terminal (completed/failed) sagas when at capacity
- Reject new sagas if only live sagas remain (fail-closed)

Lease service (lease_service.rs):
- Add MAX_LEASES constant with hard capacity limit
- Return Result<Lease, LeaseError> from grant()
- Check capacity before issuing, reject with LS_CAPACITY_EXCEEDED

Supply chain quarantine (quarantine.rs):
- Add duplicate order ID detection to prevent phantom entries
- Implement smarter eviction targeting terminal quarantine records
- Filter terminal states on lookups to avoid stale data

Staking governance (staking_governance.rs):
- Add MAX_STAKE_RECORDS constant
- Evict only terminal-state (Withdrawn/Expired) stakes
- Never evict active or slashed stakes (safety invariant)

Fleet quarantine (fleet_quarantine.rs):
- Add incident and zone-status capacity error variants
- Track convergence state for fleet operations
- Add operation slot parsing for capacity management

Revocation registry (revocation_registry.rs):
- Switch Vec<String> to BTreeSet<String> for revoked artifacts per zone
- BTreeSet prevents accidental eviction of permanent revocation state
- Add capacity guard with rejection instead of silent data loss

Remote bulkhead (remote_bulkhead.rs):
- Change outstanding_permits from BTreeSet<u64> to BTreeMap<u64, String>
- Add active_request_ids set for duplicate detection
- Track request provenance for forensic visibility

Trust card (trust_card.rs):
- Supporting changes for capacity-bounded trust operations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
